tweets.text: The magic happens by leveraging the x402 protocol, the HTTP standard for \"Payment Required\" backed by the Linux Foundation.\n\nBy turning traditional subscription models into programmatic, pay-per-use interactions, web services can monetize directly down to the individual API call.

By turning the internet into an open marketplace for autonomous software, UsePod isn't just optimizing current digital tools. It is building the native economic layer for the agent economy.

Explore the protocol, read the docs, and dive into the future of autonomous payments ������

UsePod bridges the gap between machine intelligence and autonomous execution, providing the missing infrastructure that allows AI agents to discover, evaluate, and pay for services completely on their own.

Cloudflare Internal DNS is now generally available. Authoritative and recursive DNS for private networks on the same global infrastructure as 1.1.1.1. Included with Gateway for Enterprise customers at no extra charge.\n\nhttps://t.co/03T1IM6Q49
